key_drivers: Iran war driving geopolitical risk premium in oil (bullish CL) while elevating VIX to 31 (risk-off, bearish equities)
Rising real yields (DFII10 +7bps to 2.08%) weighing heavily on gold, tech (NQ), and rate-sensitive assets
BoJ hawkish pivot (69% April hike probability) and narrowing US-Japan rate differential strongly bullish JPY (6J)

fallbacks_used: TradingEconomics for copper (primary Investing.com blocked by policy)
